name: NOCHILL Viral Scripting Master Guide
description: Complete viral scripting system with Hook Science + Storytelling Systems + 4 Foundational Principles
author: Ndivhuwo 'NO CHILL in Mzansi' Muhanelwa

foundational_principles.description: The 4 core principles that every viral script must follow

principles.name: Negativity Always Wins
principles.core_concept: At least on social media, negativity more often wins over positivity

psychology.reason: Negativity invokes MORE attention and MORE emotion than positivity

application.do: Shit on the mistake the viewer is making

examples.positive: These three leg workouts are so much better than squats, and the last one is the best.
examples.negative: Squats just fucking suck whenever it comes to actually growing your legs instead of just wasting your time in the gym. Here are three leg workouts that will actually get you some tree trunks for legs.
examples.why_negative_wins: Attacks the problem (ineffective squats) without attacking the person

implementation_steps: Start with your positive version of the hook/statement
Attack that mistake with strong language
Keep it indirect (about 'the viewer's situation' not 'the viewer')
principles.golden_rule: Always attack the problem, never the person

principles.name: You Format
principles.impact: Direct address creates personal connection. Personal connection drives higher engagement, longer watch time, and stronger conversion rates

examples.before: When someone wants to grow their following...
examples.after: When you want to grow your following...

examples.before: They need to understand the algorithm...
examples.after: You need to understand the algorithm...

implementation_process: Read through to ensure it flows naturally
principles.scope: Applies to captions, emails, sales pages, and all written content—not just video scripts

principles.name: Short & Simple As Possible
principles.core_concept: Every word must earn its place. Cut ruthlessly
principles: Use active voice over passive voice
Replace complex words with simple alternatives
Cut filler words (just, really, very, actually, literally)
Break long sentences into short punchy ones

examples.before: What I'm going to do is actually show you three different exercises that are really much better for leg development
examples.after: Here are three exercises that build bigger legs

examples.before: The thing that you need to understand is that...

social_media_rules.scroll_behavior: Users scroll if confused or bored

principles.name: The Audible Flow Check
principles.core_concept: If it doesn't sound natural when read aloud, rewrite it
process: Read it out loud at normal speaking pace
Mark any spots where you stumble
Identify unnatural phrasing or awkward transitions
Read again until it flows smoothly
red_flags: You run out of breath mid-sentence
principles.goal: Scripts should sound like natural conversation, not academic writing
principles.tip: Record yourself reading it. If you wouldn't say it in conversation, cut it

checklist.question: Does this attack the PROBLEM (not the person)?
Can I say this in fewer words?
Does this sound natural when read aloud?

hook_formula.name: R×A×C×U^B Formula
hook_formula.description: Every viral hook is built on five core components

components.name: Relevant
questions: Is this for my ideal customer avatar?
Will they recognize themselves in this?
Does this speak to their specific situation?
examples: Creators who feel judged by family
Entrepreneurs tired of platform dependency
African creators frustrated by low CPMs

components.name: Awareness
components.description: What level of understanding does your audience have?

levels.description: They feel the pain but don't know what's causing it
They know solutions exist but haven't chosen one

examples.hook: Your content gets views but no sales. Here's why...
Platform dependency is killing African creators. Here's the escape plan...

components.name: Clarity of Outcome
components.description: What transformation does your hook promise?
components.rule: Promise must be clear in first 3 seconds

examples: Here's what brands actually look for...
The algorithm change nobody's talking about...
Get 10K followers in 30 days
Land your first R50K brand deal
Stop wasting money on ads that don't convert
Avoid the tax mistakes that cost me R285K

hook_types.description: Promise to move from current state to desired state
examples: From R750 brand deals to R8,333/month retainers
From 0 email subscribers to 100K in 12 months

components.name: Unique
components.description: How does your hook break the pattern?

method_1.name: Unique Power Words
method_1.description: Words that trigger attention in unexpected contexts

african_context.usage: How to ruthlessly monetize your content even when CPMs are low
african_context.why_it_works: Military precision applied to creative work

african_context.usage: Build a bulletproof business that survives load shedding
How to weaponize your story into R100K/month
The savage truth about brand deals
The surgical precision required to turn 10K followers into R50K/month
How to make obscene amounts of money from email marketing
From bathroom floors to Netflix partnerships
For children's children - that's why I do this
I made a covenant on a bathroom floor
Digital apartheid - American creators get R200 CPM, you get R2
african_context.why_it_works: Charged historical term for systemic unfairness
Negative word for positive outcome creates cognitive dissonance

african_context.usage: I'm going to impregnate you with the ability to create viral content

method_1.key_principle: Use words natural to your voice but unexpected in context

method_2.name: Unique Angles
method_2.description: Coming at topic from unexpected perspective

angle_types.example: International gurus won't tell you this because it breaks their business model...
If I died tomorrow, this is the exact business system I'd want my children to inherit...
Instagram deleted 780K of my followers. Best thing that ever happened...
SARS wants to have a conversation with you. They're not calling to chat...
American creators get R200 per 1000 views. You get R2. That's digital apartheid...
Your family thinks you're wasting time. They're right. Unless you do THIS...
Don't give a shit what they tell you - size matters. Look at your Follow button...

pattern_interrupts: Unique power word in unexpected context
examples: Squats just fucking suck for leg growth
I lost 780K followers. Best thing that ever happened
Your family is right. You ARE wasting your life (unless...)
How to ruthlessly monetize content when CPMs are R2
The covenant I made on bathroom floors changed everything
SARS doesn't negotiate. They calculate. Here's their math on your income...
Digital apartheid: You get R2 CPM while Americans get R200
components.critical_warning: Don't force uniqueness. If an angle feels cringe or unnatural, don't use it. Speak authentically.

components.name: Broadened
components.description: How do you make it accessible to MORE people?
strategies: Focus on the principle, not the tactic

examples.narrow: If you're a fitness coach struggling with client acquisition...
examples.broadened: If you're a creator tired of content being ignored...

examples.narrow: Instagram Reels aren't converting for your gym
examples.broadened: Your content gets views but no sales

checklist.question: Is this for my ideal customer avatar?
What level does my audience understand this topic?
Is the outcome promise clear in first 3 seconds?
Does this break the pattern they expect?
Can I make this apply to MORE people without diluting?

complete_integrated_examples.description: 10 complete hook examples demonstrating all 5 components working together

examples.hook: You're accepting R750 for brand deals worth R15,000. I did the same thing. Left R14,250 on the table. Here's why brands laugh at us—and how to make them pay what they budgeted...

breakdown.R: African creators making R0-5K/month from sporadic brand deals
breakdown.A: Problem Aware - They know they're undercharging, don't know how to fix it
breakdown.C: Undesired Result - 'You're accepting R750 for work worth R15,000'
breakdown.U: Personal Story - 'I left R14,250 on the table'
breakdown.B: 'Creators accepting pennies' (not just 'fashion influencers in Joburg')

examples.hook: I lost 780,000 followers in one second. False copyright claim. Everything gone. Forced me to build something they can never delete. Here's what I built—and why you need it before you lose everything too...

breakdown.R: Creators who've built following on one platform
breakdown.A: Symptom Aware - They feel vulnerable but don't know solution
breakdown.C: A-to-B Transformation - From platform dependent to platform independent
breakdown.B: 'Anyone building on rented land' (not just 'Instagram influencers')

examples.hook: SARS sent me a letter. R285,000 owed. Penalties. Interest. Nightmare. I thought taxes were optional. They're not. Here's what happens when SARS catches you—and the system I built so it never happens again...

breakdown.R: African creators making money but ignoring taxes
breakdown.A: Problem Aware - They know they should handle taxes, don't know how
breakdown.C: Undesired Result - 'SARS is coming. Here's what happens...'

examples.hook: I have 100,000 people I can email right now. Instagram can't touch them. TikTok can't ban them. I OWN that list. Here's how I built it from zero—and why it's worth more than 1 million followers...

breakdown.R: Creators who rely 100% on social media
breakdown.A: Solution Aware - They've heard 'build email list' but haven't done it
breakdown.C: Desired Result - '100K email subscribers. Here's exactly how...'
breakdown.B: 'Creators who want owned audience' (not just 'coaches on Instagram')

examples.hook: I slept on bathroom floors for 2 months. Cold tiles. Harsh lights. Wondering if I'd made the biggest mistake of my life. Now I make R100K/month. Here's every step between the bathroom and the boardroom...

breakdown.R: Creators from humble beginnings doubting themselves
breakdown.A: Symptom Aware - They feel stuck, don't know what's holding them back
breakdown.U: Extreme Origin Story - 'Sleeping on bathroom floors'

examples.hook: American creators get paid R200 per 1000 views. You get R2. That's not bad luck—that's digital apartheid. Here's the strategy that works when CPMs are 1/10th of theirs...

breakdown.R: African creators comparing themselves to Americans
breakdown.A: Problem Aware - They know African CPMs are lower, frustrated by it
breakdown.C: Undesired Result - 'You're using American strategy in African economy'

examples.hook: My mother's last words: 'Get educated.' She died before seeing me succeed. Everything I build now? For children's children. Not for likes. Here's why that shift changes everything...

breakdown.R: Creators who want to build something meaningful
breakdown.A: Symptom Aware - They know they want 'more' but can't articulate what

examples.hook: Load shedding isn't your enemy—it's your content strategist. Forces you to batch. Forces you to plan. Here's how to create 30 days of content in 2 hours, because Eskom won't cooperate...

breakdown.R: African creators dealing with infrastructure challenges
breakdown.A: Problem Aware - They know load shedding disrupts, see it as excuse
breakdown.C: Desired Result - 'Batch 30 days of content in 2 hours'
breakdown.U: Reframe Obstacle as Strategy - 'Load shedding is your strategist'

examples.hook: You're making R300K a month and heading straight to jail. SARS doesn't forget. I owed R285K. Here's the compliance system that keeps you out of trouble...

breakdown.A: Symptom Aware - Making money but not considering tax consequences
breakdown.C: Undesired Result - 'Heading straight to jail' + 'Here's the system'

examples.hook: I mapped 46 ways content creators make money. Most people use 1. Maybe 2. I'm personally running 12 simultaneously. Here's every single one—and how to activate 5 this month...

breakdown.R: Creators dependent on one income source
breakdown.A: Solution Aware - They know about multiple streams, don't know how to activate
breakdown.C: Information Gap - '46 streams. You're using 1. Here's the other 45'
breakdown.B: 'Entrepreneurs leaving money on table' (not just 'content creators')

formula_logic.description: Miss any of R, A, or C and hook dies immediately. No foundation = no virality.
formula_logic.description_multiplier: Have R × A × C but miss U or B? Hook gets 10K views (decent). Have ALL FIVE? Hook gets 100K-1M+ views (viral potential).

retention_formula.name: Viral Retention Formula - ACT Structure
retention_formula.description: 7-Act script structure optimized for maximum retention with strategic retention devices
retention_formula.critical_principle: Every script must maintain viewer attention through strategic retention devices (open loops, sub-hooks, emotional anchors, etc.)

structure.name: The Negative Hook
structure.purpose: Stop the scroll. Create immediate emotional response. Open primary curiosity loop.
structure.energy: Low, intense, almost whisper. No music yet. Just you and lens.
elements: PAUSE - let it land (2 full seconds of silence)

retention_devices.description: Viewer thinks: 'Wait, what does he mean? Am I doing it wrong?'
examples: 96% of African creators will never make a living from content
Your content strategy is keeping you broke
You're one account ban away from losing everything

structure.script_example:
[DIRECTION] Camera tight on face. Low, intense energy. Almost a whisper.

[YOU]: 96% of content creators in Africa will never make a living from their content.

[DIRECTION] PAUSE. 2 full seconds of silence. Stare into camera.

[YOU]: Not because they're not talented. Not because the algorithm hates them. But because they're building like employees... on platforms they will never own.

platform_adaptations.short_form: 0-5 seconds maximum. Get to the negative hook immediately.
platform_adaptations.long_form: 0-30 seconds. Can add more context and setup.

structure.name: The Uncomfortable Truth
structure.purpose: Pattern interrupt. Contradict what they believe. Create cognitive dissonance.
structure.energy: Shift to conversational. More inviting but still intense.
elements: Name the lie they've been told

retention_devices.description: Contradicts viewer belief. They HAVE to hear why.
examples: Content creation is NOT a career the way you're doing it
The algorithm doesn't hate you - your content just sucks
Followers don't equal income

retention_devices.description: Introduce framework/term they haven't heard before
examples: Contentpreneur vs Content Creator
Platform Apartheid
R×A×C×U^B Formula

structure.script_example:
[YOU]: You've been lied to. They told you if you get enough followers, money will come. They told you content creation is a career.

[DIRECTION] Slight shake of head.

[YOU]: It's not. Not the way you're doing it. Content creation is a JOB. But there's another way. A word you need to learn: Contentpreneur.

structure.name: The Origin Story
structure.purpose: Build credibility through vulnerability. Create emotional anchor. Show you understand their struggle.
structure.energy: Shift to vulnerable. Slower pace. Raw emotion.
elements: Include quantified details (R400/month, 780K followers lost, etc.)
Reference recurring motif (mother's words, bathroom floors, etc.)
Show the pain before the transformation

retention_devices.description: Recurring phrase/image viewer tracks throughout video
examples: Mother's last words: 'Get educated'
Sleeping on bathroom floors
For children's children

retention_devices.description: Specific numbers that create vivid picture
examples: R400/month for family of 4 = R13/day
780,000 followers lost overnight
R285K owed to SARS

structure.script_example:
[YOU]: I was born in Tshikwarani village. Venda. My mother earned R400 a month for a family of four. That's R13 per day.

[DIRECTION] TEXT OVERLAY: 'R400/month. R13/day.'

[YOU]: At school, no girl could talk to me. The shoes, the clothes... it was bad. But my mother kept saying: 'Go to school. Get educated. That's your way out.'

structure.name: The Breaking Point
structure.purpose: Nuclear story. The moment that proves you earned your authority through suffering.
elements: Specific sensory details that create scene

retention_devices.description: Build dread - they know something bad is coming
examples: 'Then second year came...' [PAUSE]
'But I refused to go home...'
'That night, everything changed...'

retention_devices.description: From triumph to devastation in seconds
examples: From university acceptance → failed one module → lost everything
From 780K followers → false copyright claim → account deleted
From making money → SARS letter → R285K debt

structure.script_example:
[YOU]: University of Pretoria accepted me. Full bursary. First year? I excelled.

[YOU]: Then second year came.

[DIRECTION] PAUSE. Create dread.

[YOU]: I failed ONE module. REAP dropped me instantly. No accommodation. No meal plan. Everything gone. But I refused to go home.

[DIRECTION] Lean close to camera.

[YOU]: So for two months... I slept in the university bathrooms.

structure.name: The Transformation Journey
structure.purpose: Show how you went from breaking point to breakthrough. Rapid montage of wins.
structure.energy: Shift from darkness to light. Pace picks up. Music builds.
elements: Show the climb from bottom to peak

examples: Someone offered me R300K to buy the page. I said no.
Instagram deleted 780K followers. Best thing that happened.
I went BACK to school in 2024
R6,000 phone → R600,000+ revenue (10,000% ROI)
R750 first deal → R8,333 monthly retainers
0 email subscribers → 100,000 owned audience

retention_devices.description: Callback to earlier emotional anchor - full circle moment
examples: March 2025: Walked across that stage. 'Mama, I did it.'
The covenant is being fulfilled
For children's children - that's why

structure.script_example:
[YOU]: August 2013. Air Traffic Services hired me. R6,000/month. I did something crazy.

[DIRECTION] MONTAGE with text overlays

[YOU]: Spent my ENTIRE salary on a smartphone. R6,000. That phone has generated R600,000+. That's 10,000% ROI.

[DIRECTION] Quick cuts between milestones

[YOU]: 2014: 100K followers. 2017: R300K offer - said no. 2019: 5.5M views. 2020: R84K first course. Netflix. Samsung. Red Bull.

[YOU]: 2021: 780K followers deleted. Revenue didn't drop. It INCREASED.

structure.name: The Framework / Educational Value
structure.purpose: Deliver the lesson. Make it shareable. Give tactical takeaway.
structure.energy: Shift to TEACHING mode. Confident. Authoritative.

examples: Content Creator vs Contentpreneur (side by side)
PAIDS Framework (P-A-I-D-S breakdown)
R×A×C×U^B Formula components

retention_devices.description: New concept they haven't heard - memorable and quotable
examples: 'Platform apartheid' - concept they'll remember
'1 stream = vulnerable. 5 streams = unbreakable'
'Followers don't pay rent'

structure.script_example:
[YOU]: Content creator versus contentpreneur.

[DIRECTION] TEXT OVERLAY side by side

[YOU]: Content creator has an audience. Contentpreneur has a BUSINESS.

[YOU]: Content creator depends on platforms. Contentpreneur OWNS assets.

[YOU]: Here's the framework: PAIDS.

[DIRECTION] Text appears: P.A.I.D.S

[YOU]: Products. Ads & Affiliates. Information. Deals. Services. Five streams. When I had one, I was vulnerable. Five streams? Unbreakable.

structure.name: The Mission + Call to Action
structure.purpose: Rally cry. Convert emotion into action. Clear next step.
structure.energy: HIGHEST energy. Stand up if sitting. Preacher moment.

examples: I'm here to... [builds 3-5 times]
If you're... [stacks 3-4 qualifying statements]
God didn't give you this gift so you could... [contrast]
Remember the bathroom floors? That's why...
My mother's last words: 'Get educated.' This IS education.
For children's children - that's the mission

structure.script_example:
[YOU]: This is my mission. I'm here to turn African creators into contentpreneurs.

[YOU]: I'm here because my mother earned R400 a month and I refuse to let another family live on that.

[YOU]: I'm here because I slept on bathroom floors and I know the system can fail you.

[DIRECTION] Point at camera

[YOU]: If you're tired of being broke and famous... follow this page NOW.

[YOU]: If you want to build a BUSINESS from content... hit follow.

[YOU]: God didn't give you this gift so you could be famous and broke. He gave you this to be FRUITFUL. From bathroom floors to Netflix. I'm NO CHILL. Let's build.

structure.5_to_15s: ACT 2 - Uncomfortable Truth + ACT 3 snippet (1-2 lines of origin)
structure.15_to_35s: ACT 4 - Breaking Point (nuclear moment only) + ACT 5 (quick transformation)

60_second_short_form.retention_priority: Focus on emotional whiplash and one strong framework

90_second_reel.retention_priority: Can include more emotion and 1-2 retention devices per act

3_to_5_minute_youtube.description: Can use most of 7 acts with more depth

structure.0_to_30s: ACT 1 - Full negative hook with pauses

3_to_5_minute_youtube.retention_priority: Full emotional journey with all retention devices deployed

structure.60_to_150s: ACT 2 - Full uncomfortable truth with examples
structure.150_to_330s: ACT 3 - Complete origin story with B-roll
structure.330_to_480s: ACT 4 - Extended breaking point with sensory details
structure.570_to_630s: ACT 6 - Deep framework teaching with examples
structure.630_to_720s: ACT 7 - Full mission statement + multiple CTAs

7_to_10_minute_longform.retention_priority: Deploy ALL retention devices. Re-hook every 90-120 seconds.

retention_devices_glossary.open_loop: Statement that creates unanswered question viewer must stay to resolve
retention_devices_glossary.sub_hook: Secondary hook within video that re-captures attention
retention_devices_glossary.emotional_anchor: Recurring phrase/image that viewer emotionally tracks throughout
retention_devices_glossary.pattern_interrupt: Unexpected statement that contradicts common belief
retention_devices_glossary.visual_storytelling: Specific sensory details that create mental scene
retention_devices_glossary.emotional_whiplash: Rapid shift from positive to negative or vice versa
retention_devices_glossary.proof_point: Specific quantified result that builds credibility
retention_devices_glossary.call_back: Reference to earlier moment in video (creates cohesion)

critical_rules: NEVER go 30+ seconds without a retention device
ALWAYS include at least 3 retention devices in short-form (under 90s)
TEXT OVERLAYS should reinforce key numbers/statements
MUSIC should match energy shifts between acts
DIRECTION notes are part of script - they guide production
Every script must consider platform duration for proper ACT compression

story_arc.name: The 7-Stage Story Arc
story_arc.description: Every compelling story follows this structure for maximum emotional impact

stages.name: Setup (Context)
stages.description: Establish the ordinary world, introduce the character, set the scene
stages.nochill_example: I was sleeping in university bathrooms for 2 months...
stages.script_tip: Make it FAST - viewers want conflict, not exposition

stages.name: Inciting Incident (The Trigger)
stages.description: Something happens that disrupts the status quo
stages.nochill_example: My REAP bursary was cancelled after I failed one module...
stages.script_tip: This is the 'why now' moment that justifies the story

stages.name: Escalation (Rising Tension)
stages.description: The stakes increase, the problem gets worse, the pressure builds
stages.purpose: This is where emotional investment happens
stages.nochill_example: Every footstep approaching the bathroom door sent my heart racing—would I be discovered?
stages.script_tip: Stack problems - make the viewer feel the weight

stages.name: Crisis Point (The Bottom)
stages.description: The lowest moment. All hope seems lost
stages.purpose: The emotional peak that makes the transformation meaningful
stages.nochill_example: Some nights I wondered if I should just give up, go home, admit defeat...
stages.script_tip: Don't rush this - let the viewer sit in the pain

stages.name: Decision (The Turn)
stages.description: The character makes a choice that changes everything
stages.purpose: This is the pivot from problem to solution
stages.nochill_example: That night I made a covenant with God: If You get me out of this, I will use whatever platform You give me to point people back to You
stages.script_tip: Make the decision specific and active

stages.name: Transformation (The Climb)
stages.description: Show the journey from decision to outcome
stages.nochill_example: From that R6,000 Huawei phone came R600K+ in platform revenue, then Netflix partnerships, Samsung, Coca-Cola...

stages.name: Resolution (New Reality + Lesson)
stages.description: Where are they now? What's the lesson? How can viewer apply this?
stages.nochill_example: Today: 3M+ followers, 100K email subscribers, teaching thousands. The covenant is being fulfilled. You can do the same - here's how...

60_second_content.skip: Setup (condense to 1 line), Escalation (imply through Crisis), Resolution (just the lesson)

long_form_content.emphasis: Spend more time in Escalation and Transformation

paids_framework.name: PAIDS Framework
paids_framework.description: 5 revenue streams - every script should serve one
paids_framework.critical_rule: Never create content without identifying which PAIDS stream it serves. Content without monetization strategy is just expensive entertainment.

streams.name: Products
streams.description: Physical or digital products you sell directly
streams.example_hook: This R297 template generated R50K in brand deals—here's what's inside
cta_examples: Link in bio to grab yours
DM me TEMPLATE for instant access
Limited spots available - get it before it's gone

streams.name: Ads & Affiliates
streams.description: Revenue from platform ads, sponsorships, affiliate commissions
streams.example_hook: I only partner with brands I actually use—here's why I chose [Brand]

streams.name: Information
streams.example_hook: Here's the 5-step framework—full breakdown in my free masterclass

streams.name: Deals
streams.example_hook: How I landed this R50K campaign—the exact pitch email
positioning_tips: Build authority as partner, not influencer

streams.name: Services
streams.example_hook: We took this creator from R0 to R25K/month in 90 days—here's how

4e_content_engine.name: 4E Content Engine
4e_content_engine.description: Balance your content across 4 categories to build audience AND revenue

categories.name: Entertain
hook_examples: POV: You're a creator and your mom asks when you're getting a 'real job'
The 5 stages of waiting for a brand deal response
What I thought content creation would be vs. reality
categories.goal: Get discovered, build familiarity, increase shareability

categories.name: Educate
categories.purpose: Position as expert, provide lasting value
hook_examples: The R×A×C×U^B hook formula that gets 10M+ views
3 mistakes killing your content (and how to fix them)
categories.goal: Build authority, create saves/shares, establish expertise

categories.name: Encourage
hook_examples: I lost 780K followers. Here's what I learned about real success
Your family thinks you're wasting time. Prove them wrong
From bathroom floors to Netflix - the journey no one sees
categories.goal: Deepen connection, inspire belief, foster loyalty

categories.name: Earn
hook_examples: This R297 script template generated R50K in deals. Get it now
I'm taking 10 creators from R0 to R25K/month. Apply here
The exact framework from my R5,000 course - free masterclass today
categories.goal: Drive sales, generate leads, monetize audience
categories.critical_rule: Only 15% should be direct selling - trust is built through value first

weekly_posting_schedule.saturday: Educate or Encourage - Slow scroll day
weekly_posting_schedule.sunday: Earn - High engagement day for offers

balancing_strategy.monthly_review: Track which category drives most: followers, engagement, revenue. Adjust ratios accordingly.

optimization.text_overlay: Bold, large text - TikTok audiences read more

script_structure.40_to_45s: Strong CTA + loop back to hook

script_structure.50_to_60s: CTA to long-form video or subscribe

tasks: Extract 5-10 proof stories from your experience (2 hours)
Create 20 hooks from your proof stories (2 hours)
Test each hook against R×A×C×U^B formula
Select top 10 hooks for content creation
Write 5 complete scripts (60-90 seconds each) (3 hours)
Apply 4 Foundational Principles to each script
Read aloud to check audible flow
Film all 5 scripts in one batch session (2-3 hours)
Edit videos with text overlays and trending audio (3 hours)
Optimize for platform (Reels vs TikTok vs Shorts)
Engage with every comment within 1 hour
Track metrics: views, saves, shares, DMs

implementation_roadmap.expected_results: 5 pieces of high-quality content posted, initial engagement data, first DM conversations about services/products

ubuntu_principles.description: I am because we are - Community over competition
core_values: Point people back to what matters

scripting_application.we_over_i: Use collective framing - 'we' instead of 'I' when teaching
scripting_application.system_villains: Blame systems, not people - attack the problem, not the viewer
scripting_application.legacy_thinking: Always ask: does this serve the next generation?
